name: MSI PRO B650-VC WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7200+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 20Gbps Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: MSI PRO B650-VC WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16
description: ATX motherboard for AMD AM5 socket with B650 chipset, DDR5 support, and Wi-Fi 6E for mid-range builds.
